_source_of_truth: tokens.ts (primitives + semantic themes) and styles.css (CSS custom properties). This JSON mirrors them; do not diverge.

theme.archetype: Editorial luxury — brass gold + cool navy ink on cool off-white; cinematic black + cream + gold for the immersive gallery viewer.
theme.vibe: Hand-set magazine spread meets jeweller's loupe. Quiet, generous, expensive. Sharp edges, thin gold rules, serif drama against neutral UI body type.

dark_mode.description: Used EXCLUSIVELY for the immersive lights-out gallery viewer AND any 'cinematic' surfaces (hero, contract cover, presentation mode).

rules: Never invent new hues. Pick from the gold / navy / cream / sage / paper / ink ramps in tokens.ts.
Pure #000 and #FFF are reserved: #000 never appears (use Ink 0 #050505); #FFF only as Paper 100 card surface in light mode.
Gold is the ONLY brand accent. Sage is a secondary tint, used sparingly (status pills, calendar today-dot, soft tags).
Gradients are permitted but limited to the two gold treatments above — for headlines (.gold-text) and brand chips/medallions (.gold-fill). No UI-chrome gradients.
1px hairlines do most separation work; the .hairline and .hairline-gold utilities fade to transparent at the ends.
Shadows are allowed but quiet — see elevation table. Never use elevation as decoration; only for true overlays (modal, popover, sticky topbar on scroll).

roles.display: Cinzel, regular, uppercase, tracking 0.08em — wordmark, hero medallions, section overlines on cinematic surfaces. NEVER for body or UI labels.
roles.h1_editorial: Cormorant Garamond, weight 400, size 5xl–6xl, leading tight, tracking -0.01em. Use for marketing covers, gallery titles, contract titles.
roles.h2_editorial: Cormorant Garamond, weight 400 (or italic 400 for emphasis), size 4xl, leading snug, tracking -0.01em.
roles.h3_ui: Inter semibold, 22px, leading snug — dashboard section heads.
roles.h4_ui: Inter medium, 18px — card titles, modal headings.
roles.body: Inter regular, 14–16px, leading normal — all functional UI, dashboards, forms.
roles.body_long: Cormorant Garamond regular, 18–22px, leading relaxed — contract bodies, long-form editorial copy.
roles.eyebrow: Inter medium, 11px, tracking 0.32em, uppercase, color brand_gold — section labels.
roles.label_sm: Inter medium, 11px, tracking 0.2em, uppercase, color ink_tertiary — form labels, table headers.
roles.mono: JetBrains Mono regular, 12–14px — IDs, file paths, timestamps, EXIF, kbd.

rules: Three font families on any one page MAX. Display (Cinzel) is optional; default is serif + body + mono.
Cormorant Garamond italic is the 'pull quote' / 'editor's note' voice — use sparingly, never for whole paragraphs.
Tabular numerals (font-feature-settings: 'tnum','lnum') are mandatory in tables, invoice rows, and dashboards (.numeric utility).
Never center-align long paragraphs. Center H1 only on symmetric cover layouts (marketing hero, contract cover, lights-out caption).
Use extremely tight letter spacing (-0.01em) on serif headings; very wide tracking (0.2–0.32em) on uppercase labels.

marketing_editorial.description: Editorial 12-col with intentional negative space — hero, portfolio, about, pricing.
marketing_editorial.rules: Asymmetric. Allow images to break a column boundary. Leave 1–2 empty cells per row for breathing room. Pair serif headlines with mono captions.

dashboard_control_room.description: Strict aligned grid for admin/client portals.
dashboard_control_room.rules: 1px hairline borders between widgets, no shadows. Right-align numerics. Sticky 72px topbar.

gallery_mosaic.description: Masonry / 12-col mixed-aspect image grid for client galleries.
gallery_mosaic.rules: Use natural image aspect ratios; gap 16–24px; click → lights-out viewer.

spacing_and_layout.surfaces: Expose the skeleton. Sharp corners (0–4px). 1px solid borders carry separation; shadows reserved for true overlays.

elevation.gold: 0 0 0 1px rgba(168,136,79,0.28), 0 12px 30px rgba(168,136,79,0.12) — used to halo featured cards and primary CTA hover.

rules: Modal rise, page transitions use medium (340ms).
Lights-out enter/exit and hero fades use slow (700ms) ease-in-out — cinematic.
No bouncy springs. No parallax. Subtle Y-translate (4–8px) on hover for primary CTA only.
Focus state: 1px gold ring (border-color: var(--gold-400)) — not a glow.
Respect prefers-reduced-motion: collapse to opacity-only fades.

buttons.size_base: padding 14px 28px, font-size 12px, tracking 0.24em, uppercase, Inter medium.

variants.primary: bg var(--gold-300), color var(--ink-inverse) #fdf8ee. Hover: bg gold-200, translateY(-1px), subtle gold shadow.
variants.ghost: transparent, 1px border var(--ink-500), text foreground. Hover: border + text → gold-300.
variants.outline_gold: transparent, 1px border var(--gold-400), text gold-300. Hover: fill gold-300 with inverse text.

inputs.shape: var(--r-xs) (2px) sharp box. Full bordered form for dashboard; underline-only treatment optional for marketing forms.
inputs.default: bg var(--ink-100), 1px border var(--ink-400), padding 12px 14px, font-size 14px.
inputs.focus: border-color var(--gold-400). No glow, no ring offset.
inputs.label: .field-label — 10px, tracking 0.24em, uppercase, color ink_tertiary, margin-bottom 8px.

cards.default: bg var(--ink-100), 1px border var(--ink-400), radius var(--r-sm) (4px), padding s5 (24px). No shadow.
cards.elevated: Adds shadow-md. Reserve for floating widgets and sticky panels.
cards.gold: 1px border var(--gold-400) + shadow-gold. Reserve for featured/CTA cards (e.g. recommended pricing tier, signed contract confirmation).

badges.shape: border-radius 2px, 4px×10px padding, 10px uppercase tracking 0.2em, Inter medium.

dialogs.scrim: var(--scrim) — navy-tinted in light (rgba(14,23,48,0.55)), pitch black in dark (rgba(0,0,0,0.85)). Subtle 16px backdrop-blur is permitted (matches existing .modal-overlay).
dialogs.card: bg ink-050, 1px gold border, radius var(--r-sm), padding s8 (64px), shadow-lg, rise animation.

navigation.sidebar: 280px wide, solid surface, vertical, with gold hairline accents on active item.
navigation.topbar: 72px high, solid bg-canvas, 1px bottom hairline. NEVER transparent over content.
navigation.marketing_nav: Solid background OR strong 1px bottom border once scrolled. No glass.

components.tables: Sharp 1px hairlines. Header in label_sm style (uppercase, tracking 0.2em, ink_tertiary). Rows in body type, tabular numerals. Zebra striping uses surface_inset, not opacity.

icons.color: Currentcolor; gold only when icon represents a brand/premium action.

lights_out_gallery: Trigger: click any image in a gallery view.
Implementation: global state flag (e.g. useGalleryStore.isLightsOut). When true, hide nav + footer, swap body to data-theme='dark', and use the dark palette above.
Body bg locks to var(--ink-050) (#0a0a0a). Image is full-bleed, fit-contain.
Chrome: thin-stroke (1.25) left/right chevrons and a top-right close (X) icon, all in cream-50 (#f4ebd9) at 60% opacity, full opacity on hover.

No captions or metadata visible by default. On hover (or 'i' key) reveal an editorial caption block: Cormorant Garamond regular, 18px, cream-50, max-width 480px, bottom-left, with a 1px gold hairline above.
Transition: 700ms ease-in-out. Fade Y-translate(8px). Background fades through scrim before settling on ink-050.
contract_viewer: Page bg: var(--ink-200) (#f1f4f7, the inset surface) — looks like a desk.
Centered paper: pure #ffffff card, max-width 768px (~A4), 1px border ink-400, shadow-lg, padding s8.
Body: Cormorant Garamond regular, 18px, leading relaxed, justified (CSS hyphens auto, text-wrap pretty).
Signature block: rendered in a 'script' fallback (e.g. "Allura", "Caveat", italic Cormorant 32px) above a 1px gold hairline, with mono date/IP/timestamp underneath.
booking_flow: Sequential steps, one panel per step, with a thin gold progress ribbon above (4 ticks, current filled gold-300).
Calendar: sharp corners, Cormorant month header (3xl), Inter day labels (uppercase tracking 0.2em), gold-300 dot for today, filled gold-300 square for selected.
Summary rail (sticky right column on desktop): card-default with hairline rules between line items, totals in numeric tabular figures.
dashboard: Use the Control Room grid. Topbar 72px, sidebar 280px.
Each widget: card-default with a label_sm eyebrow + numeric headline (Cormorant 4xl) + sparkline / micro chart in gold-300 stroke.
Status badges follow the badge token set; never invent inline colors.
marketing_hero: Editorial grid. Cormorant 6xl headline left-aligned, max 8 cols. Cinzel display eyebrow above (gold).
Hero image is full-bleed in remaining 4 cols OR breaks below as a 12-col image strip.
Subtle film-grain overlay (.grain utility, 1.5% opacity in light, 4% in dark).

logos.usage: Banner = horizontal wordmark for nav/footer (height 32px). Lens = circular medallion (36×36) for favicons, splash, signature blocks. Both swap via the CSS var --logo-banner / --logo-lens based on data-theme.

icons.note: Use thin/elegant variants only. Avoid filled icons except the lens medallion.

imagery.policy: Photography app — imagery is the product. Use real Unsplash/Pexels photos already curated in earlier specs (fashion hero, wedding client, b&w portraits). NEVER ship hand-drawn SVG illustrations as content imagery. Placeholders (when needed during build) use the .ph-stripe utility with a mono caption.
imagery.treatment: No filters, no overlays, no rounded corners (max var(--r-sm) 4px). Let photographs read at full fidelity.

texture.grain: .grain — fixed full-viewport SVG noise overlay, opacity tracks --grain-opacity (1.5% light, 4% dark), mix-blend-mode overlay.

css_var_contract._intent: These are the exact custom property names component code reads from. Do not rename.

implementation_notes: 1. Tokens live in tokens.ts (platform-agnostic, importable by web + RN). styles.css mirrors them into CSS custom properties scoped by [data-theme='light'|'dark'].
2. Two themes only: 'light' (default UI) and 'dark' (immersive viewer + cinematic surfaces). Theme is set on <html data-theme>; body transitions bg/color in 400ms.
3. All interactive elements should keep their `data-testid` attribute, kebab-case, role-based.

4. Use the existing utility classes from styles.css (.btn, .btn-primary, .card, .badge-gold, .hairline, .eyebrow, .gold-text, .ph-stripe, .grain, .logo-banner-img, .logo-lens-img) instead of re-rolling Tailwind one-offs.
5. Lights-out is global state — wrap layout to conditionally hide nav/footer and swap data-theme to 'dark' for the duration.
6. Role-based routing (Admin / Client) protects portal screens; marketing is public.
7. E-signature: a single underline input that sets font-family to a script fallback (italic Cormorant Garamond 32px) on focus/commit.
